pdg_node.statement: (sampling_rate: positive float) -> tuple[positive int, positive int, positive int, positive int, positive int, positive int, float]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Convert time-window constants (100ms, 50ms, 200ms, 300ms, 350ms, 1200ms) from milliseconds to sample counts based on sampling_rate, and set algorithm scalar constants (M_th).

pdg_node.statement: (signal: 1-D numeric array, sampling_rate: positive float) -> 1-D float array
pdg_node.informal_desc: Apply two successive moving-average FIR filters via filtfilt: the first averages over one power-line period (~20ms) to suppress 50Hz interference; the second averages over ~28ms to suppress EMG noise above ~35Hz.

declaration.name: suppress_powerline_and_emg_noise
declaration.type_signature: (signal: 1-D numeric array, sampling_rate: positive float) -> 1-D float array
declaration.docstring: Apply two successive moving-average FIR filters via filtfilt: the first averages over one power-line period (~20ms) to suppress 50Hz interference; the second averages over ~28ms to suppress EMG noise above ~35Hz.

declaration.type_signature: (signal: 1-D numeric array, sampling_rate: positive float) -> 1-D float array
declaration.docstring: Apply two successive moving-average FIR filters via filtfilt: the first averages over one power-line period (~20ms) to suppress 50Hz interference; the second averages over ~28ms to suppress EMG noise above ~35Hz.

pdg_node.statement: (X_ma: 1-D float array, sampling_rate: positive float) -> 1-D float array
pdg_node.informal_desc: Apply a 7th-order Butterworth low-pass filter at 40Hz followed by a 7th-order Butterworth high-pass filter at 9Hz to isolate the QRS frequency band.

declaration.name: bandpass_filter_signal
declaration.type_signature: (X_ma: 1-D float array, sampling_rate: positive float) -> 1-D float array
declaration.docstring: Apply a 7th-order Butterworth low-pass filter at 40Hz followed by a 7th-order Butterworth high-pass filter at 9Hz to isolate the QRS frequency band.

declaration.name: bandpass_filter_signal
declaration.type_signature: (X_ma: 1-D float array, sampling_rate: positive float) -> 1-D float array
declaration.docstring: Apply a 7th-order Butterworth low-pass filter at 40Hz followed by a 7th-order Butterworth high-pass filter at 9Hz to isolate the QRS frequency band.

declaration.name: bandpass_filter_signal
declaration.type_signature: (X_ma: 1-D float array, sampling_rate: positive float) -> 1-D float array
declaration.docstring: Apply a 7th-order Butterworth low-pass filter at 40Hz followed by a 7th-order Butterworth high-pass filter at 9Hz to isolate the QRS frequency band.

pdg_node.statement: (X_bp: 1-D float array, sampling_rate: positive float) -> 1-D float array
pdg_node.informal_desc: Compute the nonlinear energy operator Y[n] = X[n]^2 - X[n-1]*X[n+1] for each interior sample, clamp negative values to zero, then smooth Y with a 40ms moving-average FIR (lfilter) to suppress differentiation noise.

declaration.name: compute_nonlinear_energy_envelope
declaration.type_signature: (X_bp: 1-D float array, sampling_rate: positive float) -> 1-D float array
declaration.docstring: Compute the nonlinear energy operator Y[n] = X[n]^2 - X[n-1]*X[n+1] for each interior sample, clamp negative values to zero, then smooth Y with a 40ms moving-average FIR (lfilter) to suppress differentiation noise.

declaration.name: compute_nonlinear_energy_envelope
declaration.type_signature: (X_bp: 1-D float array, sampling_rate: positive float) -> 1-D float array
declaration.docstring: Compute the nonlinear energy operator Y[n] = X[n]^2 - X[n-1]*X[n+1] for each interior sample, clamp negative values to zero, then smooth Y with a 40ms moving-average FIR (lfilter) to suppress differentiation noise.

declaration.name: compute_nonlinear_energy_envelope
declaration.type_signature: (X_bp: 1-D float array, sampling_rate: positive float) -> 1-D float array
declaration.docstring: Compute the nonlinear energy operator Y[n] = X[n]^2 - X[n-1]*X[n+1] for each interior sample, clamp negative values to zero, then smooth Y with a 40ms moving-average FIR (lfilter) to suppress differentiation noise.

pdg_node.statement: (Y: 1-D float array, sampling_rate: positive float, v350ms: positive int, M_th: float) -> tuple[1-D float array of length 5, int, float, 1-D float array, float, float, 1-D float array of length 5, int, float, float, list of int, list of int]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Seed the adaptive threshold state variables from the first 5 seconds and 350ms of the energy envelope: initialize the 5-element circular MM buffer (scaled peak of first 5s), scalar M (mean of MM), slope ramp vector, R/Rdec accumulators, 5-element RR buffer, F baseline (mean of first 350ms of Y), and empty QRS/Rpeak lists.

declaration.name: initialize_adaptive_threshold_state
declaration.type_signature: (Y: 1-D float array, sampling_rate: positive float, v350ms: positive int, M_th: float) -> tuple[1-D float array of length 5, int, float, 1-D float array, float, float, 1-D float array of length 5, int, float, float, list of int, list of int]
declaration.docstring: Seed the adaptive threshold state variables from the first 5 seconds and 350ms of the energy envelope: initialize the 5-element circular MM buffer (scaled peak of first 5s), scalar M (mean of MM), slope ramp vector, R/Rdec accumulators, 5-element RR buffer, F baseline (mean of first 350ms of Y), and empty QRS/Rpeak lists.

declaration.name: initialize_adaptive_threshold_state
declaration.type_signature: (Y: 1-D float array, sampling_rate: positive float, v350ms: positive int, M_th: float) -> tuple[1-D float array of length 5, int, float, 1-D float array, float, float, 1-D float array of length 5, int, float, float, list of int, list of int]
declaration.docstring: Seed the adaptive threshold state variables from the first 5 seconds and 350ms of the energy envelope: initialize the 5-element circular MM buffer (scaled peak of first 5s), scalar M (mean of MM), slope ramp vector, R/Rdec accumulators, 5-element RR buffer, F baseline (mean of first 350ms of Y), and empty QRS/Rpeak lists.

declaration.name: initialize_adaptive_threshold_state
declaration.type_signature: (Y: 1-D float array, sampling_rate: positive float, v350ms: positive int, M_th: float) -> tuple[1-D float array of length 5, int, float, 1-D float array, float, float, 1-D float array of length 5, int, float, float, list of int, list of int]
declaration.docstring: Seed the adaptive threshold state variables from the first 5 seconds and 350ms of the energy envelope: initialize the 5-element circular MM buffer (scaled peak of first 5s), scalar M (mean of MM), slope ramp vector, R/Rdec accumulators, 5-element RR buffer, F baseline (mean of first 350ms of Y), and empty QRS/Rpeak lists.

pdg_node.statement: (Y: 1-D float array, MM: 1-D float array of length 5, MMidx: int, M: float, slope: 1-D float array, Rdec: float, R: float, RR: 1-D float array of length 5, RRidx: int, Rm: float, F: float, QRS: list of int, Rpeak: list of int, v50ms: positive int, v200ms: positive int, v300ms: positive int, v350ms: positive int, v1200ms: positive int, M_th: float) -> list of int
pdg_node.informal_desc: Iterate sample-by-sample through Y, maintaining and updating adaptive thresholds M (refractory+slope decay), F (baseline wander tracker via 50ms sliding window difference), and R (refractory suppressor). Detect QRS events when Y[n] >= MFR = M+F+R, record candidate Rpeak as argmax of Y in next 300ms window, and update RR/MM circular buffers at each detection.

declaration.name: run_adaptive_threshold_qrs_detection
declaration.type_signature: (Y: 1-D float array, MM: 1-D float array of length 5, MMidx: int, M: float, slope: 1-D float array, Rdec: float, R: float, RR: 1-D float array of length 5, RRidx: int, Rm: float, F: float, QRS: list of int, Rpeak: list of int, v50ms: positive int, v200ms: positive int, v300ms: positive int, v350ms: positive int, v1200ms: positive int, M_th: float) -> list of int
declaration.docstring: Iterate sample-by-sample through Y, maintaining and updating adaptive thresholds M (refractory+slope decay), F (baseline wander tracker via 50ms sliding window difference), and R (refractory suppressor). Detect QRS events when Y[n] >= MFR = M+F+R, record candidate Rpeak as argmax of Y in next 300ms window, and update RR/MM circular buffers at each detection.

declaration.type_signature: (Y: 1-D float array, MM: 1-D float array of length 5, MMidx: int, M: float, slope: 1-D float array, Rdec: float, R: float, RR: 1-D float array of length 5, RRidx: int, Rm: float, F: float, QRS: list of int, Rpeak: list of int, v50ms: positive int, v200ms: positive int, v300ms: positive int, v350ms: positive int, v1200ms: positive int, M_th: float) -> list of int
declaration.docstring: Iterate sample-by-sample through Y, maintaining and updating adaptive thresholds M (refractory+slope decay), F (baseline wander tracker via 50ms sliding window difference), and R (refractory suppressor). Detect QRS events when Y[n] >= MFR = M+F+R, record candidate Rpeak as argmax of Y in next 300ms window, and update RR/MM circular buffers at each detection.

declaration.name: run_adaptive_threshold_qrs_detection
declaration.type_signature: (Y: 1-D float array, MM: 1-D float array of length 5, MMidx: int, M: float, slope: 1-D float array, Rdec: float, R: float, RR: 1-D float array of length 5, RRidx: int, Rm: float, F: float, QRS: list of int, Rpeak: list of int, v50ms: positive int, v200ms: positive int, v300ms: positive int, v350ms: positive int, v1200ms: positive int, M_th: float) -> list of int

Detect QRS events when Y[n] >= MFR = M+F+R, record candidate Rpeak as argmax of Y in next 300ms window, and update RR/MM circular buffers at each detection.

pdg_node.statement: (Rpeak_raw: list of int, signal: 1-D numeric array, v100ms: positive int) -> 1-D int array
pdg_node.informal_desc: For each candidate index in Rpeak_raw, search a ±100ms window on the original raw signal to find the true local maximum, deduplicate, sort, and return as a typed integer array.

declaration.name: refine_rpeaks_on_original_signal
declaration.type_signature: (Rpeak_raw: list of int, signal: 1-D numeric array, v100ms: positive int) -> 1-D int array
declaration.docstring: For each candidate index in Rpeak_raw, search a ±100ms window on the original raw signal to find the true local maximum, deduplicate, sort, and return as a typed integer array.
